query:
-- ============================================================
-- PLATFORM-WIDE LEARNINGS FROM FAST CUT INVOICE
-- ============================================================

-- LEARNING 1: "ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack" is ALWAYS $0.00
-- It is a bundled call pack included with the user license - never has a standalone cost
-- Fix all instances platform-wide that have non-zero cost
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] ME Call Pack is bundled at $0 per invoice evidence (Fast Cut 890124)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack%'
  AND (monthlyCost != '0.00' OR monthlyCost IS NULL);

-- LEARNING 2: "Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex" is ALWAYS $0.00
-- It is included as a $0 add-on with the user license bundle
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Softphone Webex add-on is bundled at $0 per invoice evidence (Fast Cut 890124)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Softphone%Webex%'
  AND (monthlyCost != '0.00' OR monthlyCost IS NULL);

-- LEARNING 3: "Huntgroup with Time of Day Routing" is $0.00 (included feature)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Huntgroup with ToD Routing is $0 per invoice evidence (Fast Cut 890124)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Huntgroup%Time of Day%'
  AND (monthlyCost != '0.00' OR monthlyCost IS NULL);

-- Also fix the product cost map for these bundled items
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET
  wholesaleCost = 0.00,
  retailPrice = 0.00,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE productName LIKE '%ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack%'
   OR productName LIKE '%Softphone%Webex%'
   OR productName LIKE '%Huntgroup%Time of Day%';

-- LEARNING 4: SmileTel Executive User License retail is $30/seat (5 seats = $150)
-- NOT $15/seat as previously set. The invoice confirms $150 for 5 seats = $30/seat.
-- Wait - let me check: invoice shows "SmileTel Executive User License Mar-2026 5 $150.00"
-- That's $30/seat retail. But the pricebook says $15/seat sell price.
-- The difference may be because this is the PAYG filter type at a different rate.
-- For now, update the product cost map retail to $30 for the PAYG variant
-- (keeping $15 for the MC/All filter variant as per pricebook)
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET
  retailPrice = 30.00,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE productName = 'SmileTel Executive User License'
  AND wholesaleCost = 9.00;

-- RECALCULATE Fast Cut customer totals
UPDATE customers SET
  monthlyCost = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyCost), 0)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0091' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  monthlyRevenue = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 0)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0091' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  serviceCount = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0091' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'C0091';

-- Verify the result
SELECT externalId, name, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost,
  ROUND((monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost) / monthlyRevenue * 100, 2) AS marginPercent,
  serviceCount
FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C0091';
